generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart stepper motor position and speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist stepper motor position and speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls horizontal movement of the crane cart"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vertical movement of the hoist"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lifts and handles containers"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane"
]

instance PSU : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power Supply Unit for gantry crane"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorEncoder
]

instance HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorEncoder
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements from Swing Angle Encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements from Anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series cart motor position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, SimulationService
]

instance HoistMotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series hoist motor position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, SimulationService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance SystemArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture model developed with Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message brokering"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data management"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService
]

instance TMC4671EvalController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motor controller for stepper motors"
    DTDFVocab:enables CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for gantry crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModel
]

instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation generation tool for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DocumentationService
]

instance TimescaleDBService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging service"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorage
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes crane data via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualization
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates crane dynamics against real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert, FaultNotification
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates inter-service communication via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides InterServiceCommunication
]

instance DocumentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates system documentation using MkDocs"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemDocumentation
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for deviations in crane operation"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimal crane movement paths"
]

instance FaultNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifications for system faults"
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of crane system data"
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Storage of time-series sensor and motor data"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation outcomes for crane behavior"
]

instance InterServiceCommunication : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange between digital twin services"
]

instance SystemDocumentation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Documentation of digital twin architecture and components"
]

instance SystemAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustments to crane system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane hardware environment"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, TMC4671EvalController, PSU
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for movement, homing, and trajectory execution generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to the motor controllers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with data logging and validation performed at the system's operational frequency without specified discrete intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Single PC-hosted system with Docker containers for Database, Dashboard, and MQTT Broker; Python applications for other services; MQTT protocol for inter-service communication and physical crane interface."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane during active use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds; breach notifications trigger operator intervention."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface (Python) communicates with motor controllers; MQTT protocol for service-to-service communication; Arduino handles sensor data acquisition (specific hardware protocols not detailed)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for Database, Dashboard, and MQTT Broker containers; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for other components."
]
